title: RealMLP diversity expert with batch size 512
summary: Add a RealMLP expert trained with batch_size=512 for different optimization dynamics.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Add one extra RealMLP expert with batch_size=512 and otherwise unchanged parameters. Blend lightly; do not replace the parent core.
expected_effect: Test whether different batch dynamics add useful prediction diversity.
risk: The larger batch may reduce generalization or simply duplicate the parent.
